text.en: Munajat Taibeen1 of 15Munajat(Whispered Prayers)-RepentersFrom Sahifa Sajjadiyah.

translation.en: My God, offenses have clothed me in the garment of my lowliness,
separation from You has wrapped me in the clothing of my misery!
My dreadful crimes have deadened my heart,

segments.arabic: فَأَحْيِه بِتَوْبَةٍ مِنْكَ يا أَمَلِي وَبُغْيَتِي،
segments.transliteration: faah'-yihee bitaw-batim-minka yaaa amalee wa bugh-yatee

translation.en: so bring it to life by a repentance from You! O my hope and my aim!
O my wish and my want!

segments.arabic: فَوَعِزَّتِكَ ما أَجِدُ لِذُنُوبِي سِواكَ غافِراً،
segments.transliteration: fawai'z-zatik maaa ajidu lid'unoobee siwaaka ghafiraa

translation.en: By Your might, I find no one but You to forgive my sins

segments.transliteration: wa laaa araa likas-ree ghay-raka jaabiraa

translation.en: and I see none but You to mend my brokenness!
I have subjected myself to You in repeated turning,
I have humbled myself to You in abasement.

segments.arabic: فَإنْ طَرَدْتَنِي مِنْ بابِكَ فَبِمَنْ أَلُوذُ؟
segments.transliteration: fa in t'arat-tanee mim-baabika fabiman alood'

translation.en: If You cast me out from Your door, in whom shall I take shelter?

segments.arabic: وَإنْ رَدَدْتَنِي عَنْ جَنابِكَ فَبِمَنْ أَعُوذُ؟
segments.transliteration: wa ir-radat-tanee a'n janaabika fabiman au'wd'

translation.en: If You repell me from Your side, in whom shall I seek refuge?

segments.transliteration: fawaaa asafaahoo min khaj-latee wa af-tiz''aah'ee

translation.en: O my grief at my ignominy and disgrace!

segments.arabic: وَوا لَهْفاهُ مِنْ سُوءِ عَمَلِي وَاجْتِراحِي.
segments.transliteration: wa waa lah-fahoo min sooo-i a'malee wa aj-tiraah'ee

translation.en: O my sorrow at my evil works and what I have committed!
I ask You, O Forgiver of great sins,
O Mender of broken bones,
to overlook my ruinous misdeeds
and cover my disgraceful secret thoughts!

segments.arabic: وَلا تُخْلِنِي فِي مَشْهَدِ الْقِيامَةِ مِنْ بَرْدِ عَفْوِكَ وَغَفْرِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tukh-linee fee mash-hadil-qeeaamati mim-bar-di a'f-wika wa ghaf-rik

translation.en: At the witnessing place of the Resurrection, empty me not of the coolness of Your pardon and forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَلا تُعْرِنِي مِنْ جَمِيلِ صَفْحِكَ وَسَتْرِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa tua'-rinee min jameeli s'af-h'ika wa sat-rik

translation.en: and strip me not of Your beautiful forbearance and covering!

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي ظَلِّلْ عَلَىٰ ذُنُوبِي غَمامَ رَحْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: ilaahee z'al-lil a'laa d'unoobee ghamaama rah'-matika

translation.en: My God, let the cloud of Your mercy cast its shadow upon my sins

segments.transliteration: wa ar-sil a'laa u'yoobee sah'aaba raa-fatik

translation.en: and send the billow of Your clemency flowing over my faults!

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي هَلْ يَرْجِعُ الْعَبْدُ الأَبِقُ إلاَّ إلَىٰ مَوْلاهُ
segments.transliteration: ilaahee hal yar-jiu'l-a'b-dul-aaabiqu il-laaa ilaa maw-laahoo

translation.en: My God, does the fugitive servant return to anyone other than his Master?

segments.arabic: أَمْ هَلْ يُجِيرُهُ مِنْ سَخَطِهِ أَحَدٌ سِواهُ؟
segments.transliteration: am hal yujeeruhoo min sakhat'iheee ah'dun siwaah

translation.en: Or does anyone grant him sanctuary from his Master's wrath other than his Master Himself?

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي إنْ كانَ النَّدَمُ عَلَىٰ الذَّنْب تَوْبَةً،

translation.en: My God, if remorse for sins is a repentance,
I - by Your might - am one of the remorseful!

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كَانَ الاسْتِغْفارُ مِنَ الْخَطيئَةِ حِطَّةً،

translation.en: If praying forgiveness for offenses is an alleviation,
I am one of those who pray forgiveness!
To You I return that You may be well pleased!
My God, through Your power over me, turn toward me,
through Your clemency toward me, pardon me,
and through Your knowledge of me, be gentle toward me!

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي أَنْتَ الَّذِي فَتَحْتَ لِعِبادِكَ بَابَاً إلَىٰ عَفْوِكَ سَمَّيْتَهُ التَّوْبَةَ،
segments.transliteration: ilaaheee antal-lad'ee fatah'-ta lii'baadika baaban ilaa a'f-wika sam-may-tahut-taw-bata:

translation.en: My God, You are He who has opened a door to Your pardon and named it 'repentance',

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ: ( تُوبُوا إلَىٰ اللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحَاً )،

translation.en: for You said, Repent to God with unswerving repentance.

segments.arabic: فَما عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ الْبابِ بَعْدَ فَتْحِهِ.
segments.transliteration: famaa u'd'-ru man agh-fala dukhoolal-baabi baa'-da fat-h'ih

translation.en: What is the excuse of him who remains heedless of entering the door after its opening?

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي إنْ كانَ قَبُحَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilaaheee in kaana qabuh'ad'-d'ambu min a'b-dika

translation.en: My God, though the sins of Your servant are ugly,
Your pardon is beautiful.

segments.arabic: إِلـٰهِي ما أَنَا بِأَوَّلِ مَنْ عَصاكَ، فَتُبْتَ عَلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: ilaahee maaa ana biw-wali man- a's'aaka fatub-ta a'lay-h

translation.en: My God, I am not the first to have disobeyed You, and You turned toward him,
or to have sought to attain Your favour, and You were munificent toward him.
O Responder to the distressed!
O Remover of injury!
O Great in goodness!
O Knower of everything secret!
O Beautiful through covering over!
I seek Your munificence and Your generosity to intercede with You,

segments.transliteration: wa tawas-sal-tu bijanabika wa tarah'-h'umika laday-ka

translation.en: I seek Your side and Your showing mercy to mediate with You,
so grant my supplication,
disappoint not my hope in You,
accept my repentance,
and hide my offense,
through Your kindness and mercy,
O Most Merciful of the merciful

text.en: Munajat Khaifeen3 of 15Munajat(Whispered Prayers)-FearfulFrom Sahifa Sajjadiyah.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَتَرَاكَ بَعْدَ ٱلْإِيـمَانِ بِكَ تُعَذِّبُنِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi ataraka baʿda al-imani bika tuaadhdhibuni

translation.en: My God, will You chastise me after my faith in You,
drive me far away after my love for You,

segments.arabic: أَمْ مَعَ رَجَائِي لِرَحْمَتِكَ وَصَفْحِكَ تَحْرِمُنِي
segments.transliteration: am maʿa raja'i lirahmatika wa safhika tahrimuni

translation.en: deprive me while I hope for Your mercy and forgiveness,
forsake me while I seek sanctuary in Your pardon?
Far it be from Your generous face to disappoint me?
Would that I knew—Did my mother bear me for wretchedness?
Did she nurture me for suffering?

segments.transliteration: falaytaha lam talidni wa lam turabbini

translation.en: Would then that she had not borne me and had not nurtured me!
Would that I had knowledge—
Have You appointed me one of the people of felicity?
Have You singled me out for Your nearness and neighborhood?
Then would my eyes be gladdened,
and in that my soul reach serenity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هَلْ تُسَوِّدُ وُجُوهاً خَرَّتْ سَاجِدَةً لِعَظَمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hal tusawwidu wujuhan kharrat sajidatan liʿazamatika

translation.en: My God, do You blacken faces which fall down in prostration before Your mightiness?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُخْرِسُ أَلْسِنَةً نَطَقَتْ بِٱلثَّنَاءِ عَلَىٰ مَجْدِكَ وَجَلاَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw tukhrisu alsinatan nataqat biththana'i ʿala majdika wa jalalatika

translation.en: Do You strike dumb tongues which speak in laudation of Your glory and majesty?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَطْبَعُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبٍ ٱنْطَوَتْ عَلَىٰ مَحَبَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw tatbaʿu ʿala qulubin intawat ʿala mahabbatika

translation.en: Do You seal hearts which harbor Your love?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُصِمُّ أَسْمَاعاً تَلَذَّذَتْ بِسَمَاعِ ذِكْرِكَ فِي إِرَادَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw tusimmu asmaʿan taladhdhadhat bisamaʿi dhikrika fi iradatika

translation.en: Do You deafen ears which take pleasure in hearing Your remembrance according to Your will?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَغُلُّ أَكُفّاً رَفَعَتْهَا الآمَالُ إِلَيْكَ رَجَاءَ رَأْفَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw taghullu akuffan rafaʿat-ha al-amalu ilayka raja'a ra'fatika

translation.en: Do You manacle hands which expectations have raised to You in hope of Your clemency?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُعَاقِبُ أَبْدَاناً عَمِلَتْ بِطَاعَتِكَ حَتَّىٰ نَحِلَتْ فِي مُجَاهَدَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw tuʿaqibu abdanan ʿamilat bitaʿatika hatta nahilat fi mujahadatika

translation.en: Do You punish bodies which worked to obey You until they grew thin in struggling for You?

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُعَذِّبُ أَرْجُلاً سَعَتْ فِي عِبَادَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw tuʿdhdhibu arjulan saʿat fi ʿibadatika

translation.en: Do You chastise legs which ran to worship You?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لاَ تُغْلِقْ عَلَىٰ مُوَحِّدِيكَ أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi la tughliq ʿala muwahhidika abwaba rahmatika

translation.en: My God, lock not toward those who profess Your Unity the doors of Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تحْجُبْ مُشْتَاقِيكَ عَنِ ٱلنَّظَرِ إِلَىٰ جَمِيلِ رُؤْيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tahjub mushtaqika ʿan annazari ila jamili ru'yatika

translation.en: and veil not those who yearn for You from looking upon the vision of Your beauty!
My God, a soul which You have exalted by its professing Your Unity—
how will You humiliate him by leaving him?
My God, a heart which has been knotted by its love for Your—
how will You burn it in the heat of Your fires?
My God, give me sanctuary from Your painful wrath
and Your mighty anger!
O All-loving, O All-kind!
O Compassionate, O Merciful!
O Compeller, O Subduer!
O All-forgiver, O All-covering!
Deliver me through Your mercy from the chastisement of the Fire
and the disgrace of shame
when the good are set apart from the evil,
forms are transformed,
terrors terrify,
the good-doers are brought near,
the evildoers taken far,

segments.transliteration: wa wuffiyat kullu nafsin ma kasabat

translation.en: "and every soul paid what it has earned,
and they shall not be wronged!"

text.en: Munajat Rajeen4 of 15Munajat(Whispered Prayers)-HopefulFrom Sahifa Sajjadiyahمناجاة الراجين.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ إِذا سَأَلَهُ عَبْدٌ أَعْطَاهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man idha sa'alahu ʿabdun aʿtahu

translation.en: O He who gives to a servant who asks from Him,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا أَمَّلَ مَا عِنْدَهُ بَلَّغَهُ مُنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa idha ammala ma ʿindahu ballaghahu munahu

translation.en: takes him to his wish when he expectantly hopes for what is with Him,

segments.transliteration: wa idha aqbala ʿalayhi qarrabahu wa adnahu

translation.en: brings him near and close when he approaches Him,

segments.arabic: وَإِذا جَاهَرَهُ بِٱلْعِصْيَانِ سَتَرَ عَلَىٰ ذَنْبِهِ وَغَطَّاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa idha jaharahu bilʿisyani satara ʿala dhanbihi wa ghattahu

translation.en: covers over his sin and cloaks it when he shows it openly,

segments.transliteration: wa idha tawakkala ʿalayhi ahsabahu wa kafahu

translation.en: and satisfies and suffices him when he has confidence in Him!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي مَنِ ٱلَّذِي نَزَلَ بِكَ مُلْتَمِساً قِرَاكَ فَمَا قَرَيْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi man alladhi nazala bika multamisan qiraka fama qaraytahu

translation.en: My God, who is the one who has come before You seeking hospitality, and whom You have not received hospitably?

segments.arabic: وَمَنِ ٱلَّذِي أَناخَ بِبَابِكَ مُرْتَجِياً نَدَاكَ فمَا أَوْلَيْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa man alladhi anakha bibabika murtajiyan nadaka fama awlaytahu

translation.en: Who is the one who has dismounted at Your door hoping for magnanimity, and to whom You have not shown it?

segments.arabic: أَيَحْسُنُ أَنْ أَرْجِعَ عَنْ بَابِكَ بِٱلْخَيْبَةِ مَصْرُوفاً
segments.transliteration: ayahsunu an arjiʿa ʿan babika bilkhaybati masrufan

translation.en: Is it good that I come back from Your door, turned away in disappointment,

segments.arabic: وَلَسْتُ أَعْرِفُ سِوَاكَ مَوْلًىٰ بِٱلإِحْسَانِ مَوْصُوفاً
segments.transliteration: wa lastu aʿrifu siwaka mawlan bil-ihsani mawsufan

translation.en: while I know of no patron qualified by beneficence but You?

segments.arabic: كَيفَ أَرْجُو غَيْرَكَ وَٱلْخَيْرُ كُلُّهُ بِيَدِكَ
segments.transliteration: kayfa arju ghayraka walkhayru kulluhu biyadika

translation.en: How should I have hope in other than You, when the good—all of it—is in Your hand?

segments.arabic: وَكَيْفَ أُؤَمِّلُ سِوَاكَ وَٱلْخَلْقُ وَٱلأَمْرُ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa kayfa u'ammilu siwaka walkhalqu wal-amru laka

translation.en: How should I expect from others, when Yours are the creation and the command?
Should I cut off my hope for You,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْلَيْتَنِي مَا لَمْ أَسْأَلْهُ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad awlaytani ma lam as'alhu min fadlika

translation.en: when You have shown me of Your bounty that for which I have not asked?
Would You make me have need for my like?
But I hold fast to Your cord!
O He through whose mercy the strivers reach felicity
and through whose vengeance the seekers of forgiveness are not made wretched!

segments.transliteration: kayfa ansaka wa lam tazal dhakiri

translation.en: How should I forget You, while You never cease remembering me?

segments.transliteration: wa kayfa alhu ʿanka wa anta muraqibi

translation.en: How should I be diverted from You while You are my constant watcher?
My God, I have fastened my hand to the skirt of Your generosity,
I have stretched forth my expectation toward reaching Your gifts,
So, render me pure through the purest profession of Your Unity,
and appoint me one of Your choice servants!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ هَارِبٍ إِلَيْهِ يَلْتَجِئُ
segments.transliteration: ya man kullu haribin ilayhi yaltaji'u

translation.en: O He who is the asylum of every fleer,
the hope of every seeker!
O Best Object of hope!
O Most Generous Object of supplication!

segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yuraddu sa'iluhu

translation.en: O He who asker is never rejected
And whose expectant is never disappointed!
O He whose door is open to His suppliants
and whose veil is lifted for those who hope in Him!
I ask You by Your generosity to show kindness toward me

segments.arabic: مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِما تَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنِي
segments.transliteration: min ʿata'ika bima taqarru bihi ʿayni

translation.en: through Your gifts, with that which will gladden my eye,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ رَجَائِكَ بِما تَطْمَئِنُّ بِهِ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa min raja'ika bima tatma'innu bihi nafsi

translation.en: through hope in You, with that which will give serenity to my soul,

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ بِما تُهَوِّنُ بِهِ عَلَيَّ مُصِيبَاتِ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa min alyaqini bima tuhawwinu bihi ʿalayya musibati addunya

translation.en: and through certainty with that which will make easy for me the afflictions of this world

segments.arabic: وَتَجْلُو بِهِ عَن بَصِيرَتِي غَشَوَاتِ ٱلْعَمَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa tajlu bihi ʿan basirati ghashawati alʿama

translation.en: and lift from my insight the veils of blindness!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَذْهَلَنِي عَنْ إِقَامَةِ شُكْرِكَ تَتَابُعُ طَوْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi adhhalani ʿan iqamati shukrika tatabuʿu tawlika

translation.en: My God, the uninterrupted flow of Your graciousness hast distracted me from thanking You!

segments.arabic: وَأَعْجَزَنِي عَنْ إِحْصَاءِ ثَنَائِكَ فَيْضُ فَضْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿjazani ʿan ihsa'i thana'ika faydu fadlika

translation.en: The flood of Your bounty has rendered me incapable of counting Your praises!

segments.arabic: وَشَغَلَنِي عَنْ ذِكْرِ مَحَامِدِكَ تَرَادُفُ عَوَائِدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa shaghalani ʿan dhikri mahamidika taradufu ʿawa'idika

translation.en: The succession of Your kind acts has diverted me from mentioning You in laudation!

segments.arabic: وَأَعْيَانِي عَنْ نَشْرِ عَوَارِفِكَ تَوَالِي أَيَادِيكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aʿyani ʿan nashri ʿawarifika tawali ayadika

translation.en: The continuous rush of Your benefits has thwarted me from spreading the news of Your gentle favors!

segments.arabic: وَهٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنِ ٱعْتَرَفَ بِسُبُوغِ النَّعْمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa hadha maqamu man iʿtarafa bisubughi annaʿma'i

translation.en: This is the station of him who confesses to the lavishness of favors,
meets them with shortcomings,

segments.transliteration: wa shahida ʿala nafsihi bil-ihmali wattadyiʿi

translation.en: and witnesses to his own disregard and negligence.
You are the Clement, the Compassionate,
the Good, the Generous,
who does not disappoint those who aim for Him,

segments.transliteration: wa la yatrudu ʿan fina'ihi amilihi

translation.en: nor cast out from His courtyard those who expect from Him!
In Your yard are put down the saddlebags of the hopeful
and in Your plain stand the hopes of the help-seekers!
So, meet not our hopes by disappointing and disheartening

segments.transliteration: wa la tulbisna sirbala alqunuti wal-iblasi

translation.en: and clothe us not in the shirt of despair and despondency!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي تَصَاغَرَ عِنْدَ تَعَاظُمِ آلائِكَ شُكْرِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi tasaghara ʿinda taʿazumi ala'ika shukri

translation.en: My God, my thanksgiving is small before Your great boons,

segments.arabic: وَتَضَاءَلَ فِي جَنْبِ إِكْرَامِكَ إِيَّايَ ثَنَائِي وَنَشْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa tada'ala fi janbi ikramika iyyaya thana'i wa nashri

translation.en: and my praise and news-spreading shrink beside Your generosity toward me!

segments.arabic: جَلَّلَتْنِي نِعَمُكَ مِنْ أَنْوَارِ الإِيـمَانِ حُلَلاً
segments.transliteration: jallalatni niʿamuka min anwari al-imani hulalan

translation.en: Your favors have wrapped me in the robes of the lights of faith,

segments.arabic: وَضَرَبَتْ عَلَيَّ لَطَائِفُ بِرِّكَ مِنَ ٱلْعِزِّ كِلَلاً
segments.transliteration: wa darabat ʿalayya lata'ifu birrika min alʿizzi kilalan

translation.en: and the gentleness of Your goodness have let down over me delicate curtains of might!

segments.transliteration: wa qalladatni minanuka qala'ida la tuhallu

translation.en: Your kindnesses have collared me with collars not to be moved
and adorned me with neck-rings not to be broken!
Your boons are abundant;
my tongue is too weak to count them!
Your favors are many;
my understanding falls short of grasping them,
not to speak of exhausting them!
So, how can I achieve thanksgiving?

segments.transliteration: wa shukri iyyaka yaftaqiru ila shukrin

translation.en: For my thanking You requires thanksgiving.
Whenever I say, 'To You belongs praise!'

segments.arabic: وَجَبَ عَلَيَّ لِذٰلِكَ أَنْ أَقولَ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ
segments.transliteration: wajaba ʿalayya lidhalika an aqula laka alhamdu

translation.en: it becomes thereby incumbent upon me to say, 'To You belongs praise!'
My God, as You have fed us through Your gentleness
and nurtured us through Your benefaction,
so also complete for us lavish favors,
repel from us detested acts of vengeance,
and of the shares of the two abodes,

segments.transliteration: arfaʿaha wa ajallaha ʿajilan wa ajilan

translation.en: give us their most elevated and their greatest, both the immediate and the deferred!

segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu ʿala husni bala'ika

translation.en: To You belongs praise for Your good trial
and the lavishness of Your favours,
a praise conforming to Your good pleasure
and attracting Your great goodness and magnanimity.
O All-mighty, O All-generous!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

text.en: Munajat Aarefeen12 of 15Munajat(Whispered Prayers)-of the Knowers |مناجاة العارفين.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَصُرَتِ ٱلأَلْسُنُ عَنْ بُلُوغِ ثَنَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi qasurat al-alsunu ʿan bulughi thana'ika

translation.en: My God, tongues fall short of attaining praise of You
proper to Your majesty,

segments.arabic: وَعَجَزَتِ ٱلْعُقُولُ عَنْ إِدْرَاكِ كُنْهِ جَمَالِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿajazat alʿuqulu ʿan idraki kunhi jamalika

translation.en: intellects are incapable of grasping the core of Your beauty,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْحَسَرَتِ ٱلأَبْصَارُ دُونَ ٱلنَّظَرِ إِلَىٰ سُبُحَاتِ وَجْهِكَ
segments.transliteration: wanhasarat al-absaru duna annazari ila subuhati wajhika

translation.en: eyes fail before gazing upon the glories of Your face,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَجْعَلْ لِلْخَلْقِ طَرِيقاً إِلَىٰ مَعْرِفَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam tajʿal lilkhalqi tariqan ila maʿrifatika

translation.en: and You have assigned to Your creatures no way to know You
save incapacity to know You

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَٱجْعَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ تَرَسَّخَتْ أَشْجَارُ ٱلشَّوْقِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi fajʿalna min alladhina tarassakhat ashjaru ashshawqi

translation.en: My God, place us among those within the trees of yearning for You
taken firm root in the gardens of their hearts

segments.transliteration: wa akhadhat lawʿatu mahabbatika bimajamiʿi qulubihim

translation.en: and the assemblies of whose hearts seized by the ardor of Your love!
They seek shelter in the nests of meditation,

segments.transliteration: wa fi riyadi alqurbi walmukashafati yartaʿuna

translation.en: feed upon the gardens of nearness and disclosure,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ حِيَاضِ ٱلْمَحَبَّةِ بِكَأْسِ ٱلْمُلاطَفَةِ يَكْرَعُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa min hiyadi almahabbati bika'si almulatafati yakraʿuna

translation.en: drink from the pools of love with the cup of gentle favor,
and enter into the watering-places of warm affection.
The covering has been lifted from their eyes,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْجَلَتْ ظُلْمَةُ ٱلرَّيْبِ عَنْ عَقَائِدِهِمْ وَضَمَائِرِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wanjalat zulmatu arraybi ʿan ʿaqa'idihim wa dama'irihim

translation.en: the darkness of disquiet has been dispelled from their beliefs and their innermost minds,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْتَفَتْ مُخَالَجَةُ ٱلشَّكِّ عَنْ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَسَرَائِرِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wantafat mukhalajatu ashshakki ʿan qulubihim wa sara'irihim

translation.en: the contention of doubt has been negated from their hearts and their secret thoughts,
their breasts have expanded through the verification of true knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَتْ لِسَبْقِ ٱلسَّعَادَةِ فِي ٱلزَّهَادَةِ هِمَمُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿalat lisabqi assaʿadati fizzahadati himamuhum

translation.en: their aspirations have ascended through precedent good fortune in renunciation,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿadhuba fi maʿini almuʿamalati shirbuhum

translation.en: their drinking is sweet from the spring of devotion to good works,

segments.transliteration: wa taba fi majlisi al-unsi sirruhum

translation.en: their secret thoughts are delicious in the sitting-place of intimacy,

segments.transliteration: wa amina fi mawtini almakhafati sirbuhum

translation.en: their minds are secure in the place of terror,

segments.arabic: وَٱطْمَأَنَّتْ بِٱلرُّجُوعِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلأَرْبَابِ أَنْفُسُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: watma'annat birrujuʿi ila rabbi al-arbabi anfusuhum

translation.en: their souls are serene through the return to the Lord of lords,
their spirits have reached certitude through triumph and prosperity,

segments.transliteration: wa qarrat binnazari ila mahbubihim aʿyunuhum

translation.en: their eyes have been gladdened through gazing upon their Beloved,

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَقَرَّ بِإِدْرَاكِ ٱلسُّؤْلِ وَنَيْلِ ٱلْمَأْمُولِ قَرَارُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wastaqarra bi-idraki assu'li wa nayli alma'muli qararuhum

translation.en: their settling place has been settled through reaching the request and attaining the expectation,

segments.arabic: وَرَبِحَتْ فِي بَيْعِ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِٱلآخِرَةِ تِجَارَتُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa rabihat fi bayʿi addunya bil-akhirati tijaratuhum

translation.en: and their commerce has profited through the sale of this world for the next

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي مَا أَلَذَّ خَوَاطِرَ ٱلإِلْهَامِ بِذِكْرِكَ عَلَىٰ ٱلْقُلُوبِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ma aladhdha khawatira al-ilhami bidhikrika ʿala alqulubi

translation.en: My God, how agreeable for hearts are the thoughts inspiring Your remembrance,

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَحْلَىٰ ٱلْمَسِيرَ إِلَيْكَ بِٱلأَوْهَامِ فِي مَسَالِكِ ٱلْغُيُوبِ
segments.transliteration: wa ma ahla almasira ilayka bil-awhami fi masaliki alghuyubi

translation.en: how sweet traveling to You through imagination upon the roads of the unseen worlds,
how pleasant the taste of Your love is!
How delightful the drink of Your nearness is!

segments.transliteration: fa aʿidhna min tardika wa ibʿadika

translation.en: So, give us refuge from Your casting out and Your sending far,
and place us among the most elect of Your knowers,
the most righteous of Your servants,
the most truthful of Your obedient,
the most sincere of Your worshipers!
O All-mighty, O Majestic,
O Generous, O Endower!
By Your mercy and kindness,
O Most Merciful of the merciful!

text.en: Munajat Zahideen14 of 15Munajat(Whispered Prayers)-of Abstainers |مناجاة الزاهدين.

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَسْكَنْتَنَا دَاراً حَفَرَتْ لَنَا حُفَرَ مَكْرِهَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi askantana daran hafarat lana hufara makriha

translation.en: My God, You have settled us in an abode which has dug for us pits of deception,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَّقْتَنَا بِأَيْدِي ٱلْمَنَايَا فِي حَبَائِلِ غَدْرِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ʿallaqtana bi-aydi almanaya fi haba'ili ghadriha

translation.en: and You have fastened us by the hands of death in the snares of that abode's treachery!
In You we seek asylum from the tricks of its guile,

segments.arabic: وَبِكَ نَعْتَصِمُ مِنَ ٱلاِغْتِرَار بِزَخَارِفِ زينَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa bika naʿtasimu min alightirari bizakharifi zinatiha

translation.en: and to You we hold fast lest we be deluded by the glitter of its ornaments!
It destroys its pursuers
and ruins its settlers,
it is stuffed with blights
and loaded with calamities.
My God, induce us to renounce it
and keep us safe from it
by Your giving success and Your preservation from sin.
Strip from us the robes of opposing You,
attend to our affairs through Your good sufficiency,

segments.transliteration: wa awfir mazidana min saʿati rahmatika

translation.en: amplify our increase from the boundless plenty of Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa ajmil silatina min faydi mawahibika

translation.en: be liberal in our gifts from the overflow of Your grants,
plant in our hearts the trees of Your love,
complete for us the lights of Your knowledge,

segments.transliteration: wa adhiqna halawata ʿafwika wa ladhdhata maghfiratika

translation.en: give us to taste the sweetness of Your pardon and the pleasure of Your forgiveness,

segments.transliteration: wa aqrir aʿyunana yawma liqa'ika biru'yatika

translation.en: gladden our eyes on the day of meeting You with the vision of You,

segments.transliteration: wa akhrij hubba addunya min qulubina

translation.en: dislodge the love of this world from our spirits,
just as You have done for the righteous, Your selected friends,
and for the pious, those whom You have singled out!
O Most Merciful of the merciful,
O Most Generous of the most generous!

text.en: Muhammad ibn Harith al-Nawfali, the servant of Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (`a), has reported that when al-Ma'mun, the `Abbasid ruler, decided to give his daughter in marriage to Imam Muhammad ibn `Ali (`a), the Imam (`a) wrote to him this message:

Every wife must be given a dowry from the property of her husband. As for us, Almighty Allah has put off our properties to give them to us in the Hereafter just as He has given you your properties in advance in this worldly life. I thus decide to dower your daughter with “the means to the response to the petitions.”

A number of confidential prayers, my father has given me these supplications and said that he received them from his father Musa, who told that he had received them from his father Ja`far, who told that he had received them from his father Muhammad, who told that he had received them from his father `Ali, who told that he had received them from his father al-Husayn, who told that he had received them from his brother al-Hasan, who told that he had received them from his father `Ali ibn Abi-Talib, who told that he had received them from the Holy Prophet Muhammad, who told that he had received them from Archangel Gabriel who said, “Muhammad, the Almighty Lord conveys His greetings to you and says that He is carrying to You the keys to the treasures of this world and the Next World.

He thus advises you to use them as the means to the response to your petitions. Through these confidential prayers, you can attain your desires and succeed in winning your requests. Therefore, do not use them in this-worldly requests rather than the otherworldly requests; lest, you will lessen the value of your otherworldly prizes.
These means are ten supplicatory prayers by which you can knock on the doors of your desires and they will be opened before you, and you can ask for things, and you will be given access to them.”

name: Munajat Imam Ali (as) in Masjid Kufa

text.en: Munajat (whispered prayer) of The Commander of the Faithful also known as Munajat of Masjid-e-Kufa. it is recommended to recite this in Ramadhan nights and when the servant of Allah turns to His master in the middle of the night and does Munajat, Allah will illuminate his heart...

segments.arabic: َللّـهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ الأَمَانَ يَوْمَ لا يَنْفَعُ مالٌ  وَلابَنُونَ إِلاّ مَنْ أَتَىٰ اللهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَليمٍ،
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-alukal amaana yawma laa yanfa-u’ maalun wa laa banoonun illaa man atallaaha biqalbin saleem

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for protection on the day when property will not avail, nor sons except he who comes with a heart free (from evil) (26: 88)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَعَضُّ الظّالِمُ عَلىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يا لَيْتِني اتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ الرَّسُولِ سَبيلاً
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma ya-a’z”z”uz’ z’aalimu a’laa yadayhi ya qoolu yaa laytanittakhad’tu ma-a’rrasooli sabeelaa

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when the unjust one will bite his hands saying: O would that I had taken a way with the messenger (25; 27)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يُعْرَفُ الْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسيمـاهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِالنَّواصي وَالأَقْدامِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma yu’-raful mujrimoona biseemaahum fayoo-khad’u bin nawaas’ee wal aqdaam

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when the guilty shall be recognised by their marks so they shall be seized by the forelocks and the feet (55; 41)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا يَجْزي والِدٌ عَنْ وَلَدِهِ وَلا مَوْلُودٌ هُوَ جازٍ عَنْ والِدِهِ شَيْئاً إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللهِ حَقٌّ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma laa yajzee waalidun a’n wlaadihee wa laa mawloodun huwa jaazin a’n inna wa’-dallaahi h’aqq

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when a father shall not give any satisfaction for his son nor shall the child give any satisfaction for his father, Surely the promise of Allah is true (31; 33)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا يَنْفَعُ الظّالِمينَ مَعْذِرَتُهُمْ وَلَهُمُ اللَّعْنَةُ وَلَهُمْ سُوءُ الدّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma laa yanfa-u’z z’aalimeena ma’-d’iratuhum wa lahumul la’-natu wa lahum soo-ud daar

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when the unjust shall not benefit from their excuse and for them is curse and for them is the evil abode (40; 52)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِنَفْسٍ شَيْئاً وَالأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ للهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma laa yamliku nafsun linafsin shay-an wal amru yawma-id’in lillaah

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when no soul shall control anything for (another) soul and the command on that day shall be entirely Allah's (82; 19)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ الْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخيهِ وَأُمِّهِ وَأَبيهِ وَصاحِبَتِهِ وَبَنيهِ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal amaana yawma yafirrul mar-u min akheehi wa ummihee wa abeehee wa s’aah’ibatihee wa baneehee likulli amree-in minhum yawma-id’in shaanun yughneehi

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when a man shall flee from his brother, and his mother, his father, his spouse, and his children, each one of them on that day will have a concern which will occupy him (80;34)

segments.arabic: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَوَدُّ المُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدي مِنْ عَذابِ يَوْمَئِذٍ بِبَنيهِ وَصاحِبَتِهِ وَأَخيهِ وَفَصيلَتِهِ الَّتي تُؤْويهِ وَمَنْ فِي الأَرْضِ جَميعاً ثُمَّ يُنْجيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as-alukal a-maana yawma ya-waddul mujrimu law yaftadee min a’d’aabi yawma-id’im bibaneehee wa s’aahibatihee wa akheehee wa fas’eelatil latee tooweehi wa man fil arz”l jamee-a’n thumma yunajjeehi

translation.en: And I ask You for protection on the day when the guilty will wish to redeem himself from the chastisement of that day by (sacrificing) his children, and the near of kin who gave him shelter and all those that are in the earth (wising) that this might deliver him ...
... by no means! Surely it is a flaming fire, dragging by the head (70; 11; 16)

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمَوْلىٰ وَأَنَا الْعَبْدُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْعَبْدَ إِلّا الْمَوْلىٰ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal mawlaa wa anal a’bdu wa hal yarh’amul a’bda illal mawlaa

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Master and I am the Slave, and who else can be merciful to the slave except the Master?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمالِكُ وَأَنَا الْمَمْلُوكُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَمْلُوكَ إِلّا الْمالِكُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal maaliku wa anal mamlooku wa hal yarh’amul mamlooka illal maalik

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Owner and I am the one owned by You, and who else can be merciful to the owned except the owner?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْعَزيزُ وَأَنَا الذَّليلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الذَّليلَ إِلّا الْعَزيزُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antla a’zeezu wa anad’ d’aleelu wa hal yarh’amud’ d’aleela illal a’zeez

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Mighty and I am the low, and who else can be merciful to the low except the Mighty?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْخالِقُ وَأَنَا الْمَخْلُوقُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ المَخْلُوقَ إِلّا الْخالِقُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal khaaliqu wa anal makhlooqu wa anal makhlooqu wa hal yarh’amul makhlooqa illal khaaliq

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Creator and I am the creature, and who else can be merciful to the creature except the Creator?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْعَظيمُ وَأَنَا الْحَقيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْحَقيرَ إِلّا الْعَظيمُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaay antal a’zeemu wa anal h’aqeeru wa hal yarh’amul h’aqeera illal a’zeem

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Glorious and I am the miserable, and who else can be merciful to the miserable except the Glorious?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْقَوِيُّ وَأَنَا الضَّعيفُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الضَّعيفَ إِلّا الْقَوِيُّ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaay antal qawiyyu wa anal za’eefu wa hal yarh’amul za’eefa illal qawiy

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Powerful and I am the weak, and who else can be merciful to the weak except the Powerful?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ وَأَنَا الْفَقيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْفَقيرَ إِلّا الْغَنِيُّ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal ghaniyyu wa anal faqeeru wa hal yarh’amul faqeera illal ghaniyy

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Wealthy and I am the Poor, and who else can be merciful to the poor except the Wealthy?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُعْطي وَأَنَا السّائِلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ السّائِلَ إِلّا الْمُعْطي
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal mu’-t’ee wa anas saa-ilu wa hal yarh’amus saaila illal mu’-t’ee

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Bestower and I am the beggar, and who else can be merciful to the beggar except the Bestower?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْحَيُّ وَأَنَا الْمَيِّتُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَيِّتَ إِلّا الْحَيُّ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal h’ayyu wa anal mayyitu wa hal yarh’amul mayyita illal h’ayy

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Living and I am the dead, and who else can be merciful to the dead except the Living?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْباقي وَأَنَا الْفاني وَ هَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْفانيَ إِلّا الْباقي
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal baaqee wa anal faanee wa hal yarh’amul faanee illal baaqee

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Eternal and I am the transient, and who else can be merciful to the transient except the Eternal?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الدّائِمُ وَأَنَا الزّائِلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الزّائِلَ إِلّا الدّائِمُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal daa-imu wa anaz zaa-ilu wa hal yarh’amuz zaaila illad daa-im

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Permanent and I am the short-lived, and who else can be merciful to the short-lived except the Permanent?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرّازِقُ وَأَنَا الْمَرْزُوقُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْزُوقَ إِلّا الرّازِقُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antar raaziqu wa anal marzooqu wa anal marzooqu wa hal yarh’amul marzooqa illar raaziq

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Provider and I am the blessed, and who else can be merciful to the blessed except the Provider?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْجَوادُ  وَأَنَا الْبَخيلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْبَخيلَ إِلّا الْجَوادُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal ja waadu wa anal bakheelu bakheela illal jawaad

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Generous and I am the miser, and who else can be merciful to the miser except the Generous?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُعافي وَأَنَا الْمُبْتَلىٰ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُبْتَلىٰ إِلّا الْمُعافي
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal mua’afee wa anal mubtalaa wa  hal yarh’amul mubtalaa illal mu-a’afee

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Healer and I am the afflicted, and who else can be merciful to the afflicted except the Healer?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْكَبيرُ وَأَنَا الصَّغيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الصَّغيرَ إِلّا الْكَبيرُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal kabeeru wa anas’ s’agheeru wa hal yarh’amus’ s’agheera illal kabeer

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Great and I am the insignificant, and who else can be merciful to the insignificant except the Great?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْهادي وَأَنَا الضّالُّ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الضّالَّ إِلّا الْهادي
segments.transliteration: mawlayaa yaa mawlaaya antal hadee wa anaz” z”allu wa hal yarh’amuz” z”aalla illal haadee

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Leading and I am the straying, and who else can be merciful to the straying except the Leading?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرَّحْمنُ وَأَنَا الْمَرْحُومُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْحُومَ إِلّا الرَّحْمنُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antar rah’maanu wa anal marh’oomu wa hal yarh’amul marh’ooma illar rah’maan

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Merciful and I am the one shown mercy, and who else can be merciful to the one shown mercy except the Merciful?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يامَوْلايَ أَنْتَ السُّلْطانُ وَأَنَا الْمُمْتَحَنُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُمْتَحَنَ إِلّا السُّلْطانُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antas sult’aanu wa anal mumtah’anu wa hal yarh’amul mumtah’ana illas sult’aan

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Authority and I am the tried, and who else can be merciful to the tried except the Authority?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الدَّليلُ وَأَنَا الْمُتَحَيِّرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُتَحَيِّرَ إِلّا الدَّليلُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antad daleelu wa anal mutah’ayyiru wa hal mutah’ayyira ilad daleel

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Guide and I am the confused, and who else can be merciful to the confused except the Guide?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ وَأَنَا الْمُذْنِبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُذْنِبَ إِلّا الْغَفُورُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya antal ghafooru wa anal mud’nibu wa hal yrh’amul mud’nibu illal ghafoor

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Forgiver and I am the sinner, and who else can be merciful to the sinner except the Forgiver?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغالِبُ وَأَنَا الْمَغْلُوبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَغْلُوبَ إِلّا الْغالِبُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal ghaalibu wa anal maghloobu wa hal yarh’amul maghlooba illal ghaalib

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Victor and I am the defeated, and who else can be merciful to the defeated except the Victor?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرَّبُّ وَأَنَا الْمَرْبُوبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْبُوبَ إِلّا الرَّبُّ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antar rabbu wa anal marboobu wa hal yarh’amul marbooba illar rabb

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Nourisher and I am the nourished, and who else can be merciful to the nourished except the Nourisher?

segments.arabic: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُتَكَبِّرُ وَأَنَا الْخاشِعُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْخاشِعَ إِلّا الْمُتَكَبِّرُ
segments.transliteration: mawlaaya yaa mawlaaya antal mutakabbiru wa anal khaashi-u’ wa hal yarh’amul kaashi-a’ illal mutakabbir

translation.en: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the High-handed and I am the humble, and who else can be merciful to humble the except the High-handed?
My Lord, O my Lord, have mercy on me by Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: warz”a a’nnee bijoodika wa karamika wa faz”lika

translation.en: and be pleased with me by Your Generosity and Your Magnanimity and Your Grace,

segments.arabic: يا ذَا الْجُودِ وَالاِحْسانِ وَالطَّوْلِ وَالِإمْتِنانِ
segments.transliteration: yaa d’al joodi wal ih’saani wat’t’ooli wal imtinaani

translation.en: O the Generous, and Beneficent, O the Almighty and the Benefactor,
By your Mercy, O the most Merciful of the Merciful.
